title: Add connect_timeout to LightwalletdClient::connect
description:
wallet/src/client.rs Endpoint builder lacks a connect_timeout(). If lightwalletd is firewalled or slow to respond, connect() hangs indefinitely (OS TCP timeout ~130s). Add .connect_timeout(Duration::from_secs(15)) to the Endpoint chain before .connect().await. The 15s value matches common gRPC client conventions and gives three full TCP retransmit windows before failing.

Algorithm:
1. Open wallet/src/client.rs, find the Endpoint::from_shared(...).tls_config(...).connect().await chain.
2. Insert .connect_timeout(std::time::Duration::from_secs(15)) before .connect().await.
3. cargo build -p nie-wallet; cargo test -p nie-wallet.

Defensive rules: no unwrap(), import Duration from std::time, leave all other Endpoint config unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-wallet succeeds; connect_timeout(15s) visible in source
